      Digital FormsHomepage

      Android Developer (Regular)

      • Remote
        • Warsaw, Mazowieckie, Poland
      • PLN 13,440 - PLN 26,880 per month

      Job description

      Do you want to build innovative mobile applications that reach thousands of users worldwide? At Digital Forms, we’re looking for a skilled Android Developer to join our fully remote team and help us create seamless, high-quality digital experiences.

      What you’ll do

      • Develop and maintain Android applications following industry best practices.

      • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define, design, and ship new features.

      • Troubleshoot, debug, and optimize application performance.

      • Participate in code reviews and share knowledge with your peers.

      Job requirements

      What we expect

      • 4+ years of experience in Android development.

      • Develop and maintain Android applications following industry best practices.

      • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define, design, and ship new features.

      • Troubleshoot, debug, and optimize application performance.

      • Participate in code reviews and contribute to team knowledge-sharing sessions.

      • Advanced proficiency in Kotlin and Java.

      • Experience with architectural patterns (e.g., MVVM, MVP) and dependency injection.

      • Strong understanding of RESTful APIs and third-party libraries.

      • Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal.

      • Possibility of working from 3pm to 7pm

      • Excellent communication skills

      • Work for foreign clients in English

        What we offer

        • A fully remote role with the possibility to work from our office in Warsaw (Mazowieckie, Poland).

        • The opportunity to work on exciting projects with an experienced and supportive team.

        • A culture that values knowledge sharing, collaboration, and continuous learning.


        If you’re passionate about building Android applications and want to be part of a forward-thinking company, we’d love to hear from you!

      Remote
      • Warsaw, Mazowieckie, Poland
      PLN 13,440 - PLN 26,880 per month
